examples: Aunt Estelle's unselfishness was her greatest gift.
If only a similar unselfishness prevailed on Capitol Hill.
There's a price tag for being a people-builder: It requires unselfishness.
Standing 6 feet 6, with a shorter man's ability to dribble and pass and a willingness to play with toughness and unselfishness, Gola was sui generis in that era of basketball.
We remember that it is their courage, their unselfishness, their devotion to duty that has sustained this country through all its trials and will sustain us through all the trials to come.
